quoted_text: submits a task, Then the task appears in the job queue
meaning_a: "task" as used in AS1 and Edge Cases
meaning_b: "job" as used in FR-001–FR-007, AS2, AS3
decision_needed: Confirm "job" as the single term for the schedulable unit and replace "task" in AS1 and Edge Cases — or define "task" as a distinct concept.

quoted_text: purge all entries whose TTL has expired
meaning_a: cached run results past the result cache time-to-live (FR-004)
decision_needed: Which entries does the cleanup worker purge — expired cached results, expired leases, or both? Name the TTL explicitly in FR-006.

quoted_text: display the schedule for each job
meaning_a: the recurrence rule — the job's cron expression (FR-001)
meaning_b: the list of upcoming runs (Success Criteria "next ten runs"; Edge Cases "empty schedule")
decision_needed: Does the dashboard schedule show the cron expression, the upcoming-run list, or both as separately named fields?
